skill1.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle. Affects self. Charges Restraint Chains by 10, up to 10.
skill1.note: Charge-to-10 is implicit: the 10 chains are immediately dumped as 10x50.06%=500.6% at battle start. Resource itself not tracked, only its damage payoff.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when Full Burst ends if this unit has just used her Burst Skill. Affects self. Charges Restraint Chains by 10, up to 10.
skill1.note: Refill+dump once per rotation. Modeled UNCONDITIONAL on fullBurstEnd; kit gates on 'if she just bursted'. Over-fires in multi-B3 teams, benign in scope-lock (she is the sole B3, so FB end == her burst end). See findings + note.

skill1.kitLine: Affects random enemy units at a specific timing. Deals 50.06% of final ATK as damage. Attacks once for every Restraint Chain. Restraint Chain -1 for each attack.
skill1.note: Consolidated 10 per-chain hits into one 500.6% flatDamage dump. 'Specific timing' is kit-silent; pinned to battle start / FB end (flagged caveat).

skill1.kitLine: Affects the same enemy units. Ensnaring Chains: Deals 25.08% final ATK as sustained damage every 1 sec continuously, stacks up to 20 time(s). Cannot be removed.
skill1.where: skill1[2] passive dot atkPct 301, durationSec 999, intervalSec 1, flavor sustained
skill1.note: Permanent baseline DoT at the rebuild-aware average of ~12 stacks (12x25.08%=300.96~301%/s), NOT the 20 cap. Average absorbs burst-cancel/rebuild cycle + S2's +1-per-40-normals feed. Refit 10.8->12 (2026-07-13). Inherits S2 sustainedDamagePct via Damage-Up bucket.

skill2.kitLine: Activates after landing 40 normal attacks during Full Burst on a target in the Ensnaring Chains state. Affects the target. Ensnaring Chains stacks +1.
skill2.where: folded into skill1[2] dot atkPct 301 (12-stack average)
skill2.note: NOT a discrete hitCount block. The +1-per-40-normals feed during FB windows is folded into the calibrated steady-state stack average (caveat: '12-stack rebuild average'). This is the main calibration lever.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when the skill user is incapacitated. Affects targets in the Ensnaring Chains state. Ensnaring Chains stacks +20.
skill2.note: Defensive trigger; boss deals no damage in v1 so she is never incapacitated. Inert in scope-lock.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when an enemy is neutralized while in the Ensnaring Chains state. Affects self. Restraint Chain +1, up to 10.
skill2.note: Boss never dies in scope-lock, so never fires. Inert.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when entering Burst Stage 3. Affects self. Sustained Damage +59.98% for 10 sec.
skill2.note: Parsed correctly; DoTs inherit this via the Damage-Up bucket. skill2 blocks auto-filled from offline parser 2026-07-16, behavior-identical to runtime parse, NOT hand-verified (provenance flag).

burst.kitLine: Affects targets in Ensnaring Chains status. Dragging Chain: Deals 50.05% of final ATK as sustained damage every 1 sec. Mirrors the stack count of Ensnaring Chains on each target for 10 sec. Cannot be removed.
burst.where: burst[0] burstCast dot atkPct 700 / 10s / intervalSec 1 / sustained
burst.note: Mirror of 20 stacks = 1001%/s, but encoded as the DELTA 700 (=1001-301 baseline) for 10s to avoid double-counting the always-on skill1 baseline. During the burst window total DoT = 301+700 = 1001%/s, correct. Parser had missed the x20 mirror entirely (read only 50.05%/s).

burst.kitLine: Cancels Ensnaring Chains after the effect is triggered.
burst.note: The cancel-to-0-then-rebuild cycle is what drives the ~12-stack time-weighted average baseline (rebuilds +10 from Restraint dump at next FB end + 1/40 normals, re-reaching ~20 just before next burst). Not a standalone block; represented through the baseline DoT magnitude. Documented in note.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1 Restraint-dump timing ('at a specific timing') is kit-silent — modeled at battle start / Full Burst end (flag).
documentedConfounds.why: Total dumped damage (10 chains x 50.06%) is preserved regardless of timing; only the frame of delivery shifts, negligible on a 180s total.

documentedConfounds.text: fullBurstEnd dump is unconditional; kit gates on 'if she just bursted' — over-fires in multi-B3 teams.
documentedConfounds.why: Benign in scope-lock: she is the team's sole Burst III, so Full Burst end coincides with her own burst end. Only matters in multi-B3 comps, out of scope.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2 40-normals-in-Full-Burst Ensnaring generation folded into skill1 steady-state DoT average (flag calibrated 12-stack rebuild average), not a discrete hitCount block.
documentedConfounds.why: This is the active calibration lever. It moved the ratio from 1.19-1.51 (permanent-20-stack baseline) to 1.03, and was refit 10.8->12 after riders lost the universal range bonus. Any error in the stack average directly scales the dominant DoT damage; most likely source of residual gap.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2 'when incapacitated' +20 Ensnaring — defensive, skipped (boss deals no damage in v1).
documentedConfounds.why: Trigger cannot fire against a partless boss that deals no damage; zero damage impact in scope-lock.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2 'when enemy neutralized' +1 Restraint — boss never dies, skipped.
documentedConfounds.why: Boss is never neutralized in a 180s DPS sim; trigger inert, zero damage impact.

documentedConfounds.text: Burst Dragging Chain encoded as 700%/s DELTA on top of the 301%/s baseline (not a naive 1001 stacked on baseline) to avoid ~195M over-count.
documentedConfounds.why: Decomposition is arithmetically exact (301+700=1001=20x50.05 during the window); documented and self-consistent. Risk would be a double-count, which the author explicitly avoided.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2 blocks materialized 2026-07-16 from offline parser (blablalink prose), behavior-identical to prior runtime parse, NOT hand-verified.
documentedConfounds.why: Provenance flag only; claimed behavior-identical. The only skill2 block that affects damage (stageEnter-3 sustainedDamagePct) is a simple buff and parses unambiguously.

authorIntentSummary: The author models Mihara: Bonding Chain's two stack currencies (Restraint Chains, Ensnaring Chains) as steady-state throughput rather than discrete stack simulation. Restraint is charged to 10 and dumped as a consolidated 500.6% (10x50.06%) flatDamage hit at battle start and once per rotation at Full Burst end; Ensnaring is a permanent baseline DoT at a calibrated ~12-stack average (301%/s), and the burst's Dragging Chain mirror (20 stacks = 1001%/s) is added as a 700%/s delta for 10s to avoid double-counting the baseline. Key approximations: the kit-silent Restraint-dump timing is pinned to battle start/FB end, the fullBurstEnd dump is unconditional (benign because she is the sole B3), and S2's +1-per-40-normals feed is folded into the calibrated stack average — the main tuning lever, refit 10.8->12 (2026-07-13), which brought the ratio from 1.19-1.51 hot to 1.03. Known-not-faithful spots are all documented and inert in scope-lock: S2's 'when incapacitated' (+20 Ensnaring) and 'when enemy neutralized' (+1 Restraint) triggers are skipped (boss deals no damage / never dies), and the skill2 blocks are parser-materialized, not hand-verified.
